description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, including a tailored suit jacket, matching trousers, a collared shirt, and a necktie. The figure stands with a slight forward lean, one arm relaxed at the side and the other bent at the elbow, giving a natural, lifelike posture. The facial features are well-defined, with short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven appearance. The suit is complemented by polished dress shoes, and the overall look is professional and appropriate for urban or office environments. The figure's proportions and stance suggest a realistic human scale, suitable for use in city or street scenes. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a businesslike demeanor.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit, collared shirt, and tie, standing in a natural, slightly forward-leaning posture. The figure has short hair and wears dress shoes, presenting a professional urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, collared shirt, and facial features with a slightly forward-leaning stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm bent at the elbow, and the fitted suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the back of the head with short hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the straight posture, arm position, and the side profile of the suit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing with a slight forward lean
